enum_values.name: Scale3
enum_values.description: Scale 3 mode

enum_values.name: Scale2
enum_values.description: Scale 2 mode

fields.name: FPDS
fields.description: Flash power down in Stop mode

enum_values.name: Idle
enum_values.description: Flash memory not in power-down when the device is in Stop mode

enum_values.name: PowerDown
enum_values.description: Flash memory in power-down when the device is in Stop mode

enum_values.name: Protected
enum_values.description: Access to RTC and RTC Backup registers and backup SRAM disabled

enum_values.name: Writable
enum_values.description: Access to RTC and RTC Backup registers and backup SRAM enabled

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: PVD disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: PVD enabled

enum_values.name: Zero
enum_values.description: This bit is always read as 0

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Clear the SBF Standby Flag

enum_values.name: Zero
enum_values.description: This bit is always read as 0

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Clear the WUPF Wakeup Flag **after 2 System clock cycles**

enum_values.name: EnterStop
enum_values.description: Enter Stop mode when the CPU enters deepsleep. The regulator status depends on the LPDS bit

enum_values.name: EnterStandby
enum_values.description: Enter Standby mode when the CPU enters deepsleep

enum_values.name: Main
enum_values.description: Main voltage regulator ON during Stop mode

enum_values.name: LowPower
enum_values.description: Low-power voltage regulator ON during Stop mode

fields.name: MRLVDS
fields.description: Main regulator Low Voltage in Deep Sleep

enum_values.name: On
enum_values.description: Main regulator ON when the device is in Stop mode

enum_values.name: UnderDrive
enum_values.description: Main Regulator in under-drive mode and Flash memory in power-down when the device is in Stop under-drive mode

fields.name: LPLVDS
fields.description: Low-power regulator Low Voltage in Deep Sleep

enum_values.name: On
enum_values.description: Low-power regulator ON if LPDS bit is set when the device is in Stop mode

enum_values.name: UnderDrive
enum_values.description: Low-power regulator in under-drive mode if LPDS bit is set and Flash memory in power-down when the device is in Stop under-drive mode

enum_values.name: NotOccurred
enum_values.description: No wakeup event occurred

enum_values.name: Occurred
enum_values.description: A wakeup event was received from the WKUP pin or from the RTC alarm (Alarm A or Alarm B), RTC Tamper event, RTC TimeStamp event or RTC Wakeup)

enum_values.name: InStandby
enum_values.description: Device has not been in Standby mode

enum_values.name: NotInStandby
enum_values.description: Device has been in Standby mode

enum_values.name: Higher
enum_values.description: Vdd is higher than the PVD threshold selected with the PLS[2:0] bits

enum_values.name: Lower
enum_values.description: Vdd is lower than the PVD threshold selected with the PLS[2:0] bits

enum_values.name: NotReady
enum_values.description: Backup Regulator not ready

enum_values.name: Ready
enum_values.description: Backup Regulator ready

enum_values.name: GPIO
enum_values.description: WKUP1 pin is used for general purpose I/O. An event on the WKUP1 pin does not wakeup the device from Standby mode

enum_values.name: WakeUp
enum_values.description: WKUP1 pin is used for wakeup from Standby mode and forced in input pull down configuration (rising edge or falling on WKUP pin wakes-up the system from Standby mode)

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Backup regulator disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Backup regulator enabled

fields.name: VOSRDY
fields.description: Regulator voltage scaling output selection ready bit

enum_values.name: NotReady
enum_values.description: Not ready

enum_values.name: Ready
enum_values.description: Ready
